title: Perfectly Pan Roasted Dutch Asparagus Skillet
description: A nutty and crumbly Dutch dish featuring asparagus, perfect for a lazy Sunday, with a low sodium content and a unique binchotan-charcoal flavor.
instructions: Preheat a large skillet over medium heat with the butter until melted.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the asparagus to the skillet and cook for 5 minutes until tender.
Sprinkle the binchotan charcoal powder, salt, and black pepper over the asparagus and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Remove the skillet from the heat and sprinkle the parmesan cheese over the asparagus.
Let the cheese melt for 1 minute before sprinkling the chopped parsley over the top.
Serve the asparagus hot, straight from the skillet.
